summary: Scaffolded a native Windows local LLM gateway workspace in AUDiaLLMGateway.
details: Created a Git-backed repo scaffold with config, docs, PowerShell wrappers, and Python orchestration for llama-server plus LiteLLM.
Added health checks, routing tests, and config generation for local model profiles and future MCP registration.
Ran py_compile, generated LiteLLM config, exercised the stop-stack wrapper, and passed pytest.

summary: Renamed the local LLM gateway workspace from AUDiaLLMEnvironment to AUDiaLLMGateway.
details: Renamed the repo directory to AUDiaLLMGateway.
Updated README and changelog references to the new project name.
Re-ran tests and config generation from the renamed path.

summary: Added the first mid-level project spec for AUDiaLLMGateway.
details: Created a specifications folder with a mid-level phase 1 gateway spec.
Mapped the original plan to the current scaffold, config model, operational flows, and acceptance criteria.
Kept the spec intentionally mid-level so follow-on low-level specs can expand backend, LiteLLM, and MCP details.

summary: Expanded spec-001 to define Windows-first scope and planned Linux options.
details: Updated the mid-level spec to make Windows the active phase 1 target.
Added Linux as a planned parallel platform with different launch and deployment options.
Clarified that platform-specific differences should not change the external gateway contract.

summary: Refactored AUDiaLLMGateway to use llama-swap as the managed local backend behind LiteLLM.
details: Replaced direct llama-server orchestration with a llama-swap runtime, generated config workflow, and LiteLLM alias publishing.
Added a stack config, imported the provided llama-swap catalog as the repo baseline, and generated MCP client-facing config scaffolding.
Added Windows install/update/generate scripts and updated docs/specs/tests for the new architecture.

summary: Moved AUDiaLLMGateway run artifacts into the Gateway workspace artifact root.
details: Migrated the Gateway-related codex plan-run directories out of AUDiaLLMOverseer artifact storage.
Created the Gateway-local artifact root and confirmed no AUDiaLLMGateway run artifacts remain in the Overseer workspace.
Re-ran pytest in AUDiaLLMGateway after the cleanup.

summary: Added release-based install/update, layered config preservation, install-state tracking, and component specs to AUDiaLLMGateway.
details: Implemented a GitHub release installer/update path with bootstrap scripts for Windows, Linux, and macOS plus state tracking in state/install-state.json.
Restructured config into project, local, and generated layers so updates preserve machine-local overrides while validation warns on conflicts.
Added component and platform specs, installer manifest/state handling, and verified pytest, py_compile, config generation, config validation, installer help, and separation checks.

summary: Added versioned llama.cpp component management with backend selection to the Gateway installer model.
details: Extended layered config and the release installer to treat llama.cpp as a managed component with backend/version settings and install-state tracking.
Made generated llama-swap config capable of using the installed llama-server path from install state when local overrides do not replace it.
Updated docs and specs for Windows Vulkan defaults and added installer tests for release asset selection.

summary: Added Windows HIP llama.cpp variant support and online release checking for managed components.
details: Extended llama.cpp component settings to support Windows HIP asset selection and optional sidecar DLL copying for builds that need extra runtime files.
Added check-updates commands and state reporting so gateway updates can query upstream release metadata for the gateway and llama.cpp.
Updated docs/specs and re-verified pytest, py_compile, config generation, and installer CLI help.

summary: Updated AUDiaLLMGateway defaults to use the ExampleOrg/AUDiaLLMGateway GitHub repository.
details: Changed the release installer defaults and release manifest owner to ExampleOrg.
Updated bootstrap and documentation examples to point at the real GitHub repo.
Re-ran pytest, py_compile, and config validation after the change.

summary: Branded Gateway scripts are now exposed as the primary install and operations entrypoints.
details: Added AUDiaLLMGateway-prefixed script wrappers in scripts/ and bootstrap/ for the public install/update/operations flows.
Updated README and operational docs to use the branded script names as the default interface while preserving legacy aliases.
Verified config validation, test suite, and strict separation checks after the rename.

summary: The Gateway repo now exposes a single AUDiaLLMGateway command with subcommands instead of multiple branded wrapper scripts.
details: Added scripts/AUDiaLLMGateway.ps1 and scripts/AUDiaLLMGateway.sh as the unified command surface for install, update, config, runtime, and test actions.
Removed the per-action AUDiaLLMGateway-* wrapper files from scripts/ and updated README and runbook examples to use subcommands.
Verified the unified command with validate-configs and help output, and re-ran the test suite and strict separation check.
